name: Product Hunt GraphQL API
description: A GraphQL API providing access to Product Hunt's platform data including daily product launches, votes, comments, maker profiles, topics, and collections. Supports OAuth 2.0 authentication with public, private, and write permission scopes.

apiEndpoint.name: GraphQL Endpoint
apiEndpoint.description: Single GraphQL endpoint for all queries and mutations

potentialAction.name: Query Posts
potentialAction.description: Look up Posts by various parameters including featured status, date range, topics, and ordering

potentialAction.name: Query Collections
potentialAction.description: Look up Collections including featured collections, by user, or by post

potentialAction.name: Query Topics
potentialAction.description: Look up Topics by name, followed by user, or by order

potentialAction.name: Query Users
potentialAction.description: Look up Users by ID or username, including their posts, followers, and following

potentialAction.name: Query Goals
potentialAction.description: Look up maker Goals by user, group, or project

potentialAction.name: Query MakerGroups
potentialAction.description: Look up MakerGroups (Spaces) by members, goals count, or activity

potentialAction.name: Mutate goalCheer
potentialAction.description: Cheer a Goal as the authenticated viewer

potentialAction.name: Mutate goalCreate
potentialAction.description: Create a Goal for the authenticated viewer

potentialAction.name: Mutate goalUpdate
potentialAction.description: Update a Goal's due date, title, project, or group

potentialAction.name: Mutate userFollow
potentialAction.description: Follow a User as the authenticated viewer

potentialAction.name: Mutate userFollowUndo
potentialAction.description: Stop following a User as the authenticated viewer

api:authorizationScopes.name: public
api:authorizationScopes.description: Allows access to public information on Product Hunt

api:authorizationScopes.name: private
api:authorizationScopes.description: Allows access to Product Hunt on behalf of the authenticated user, e.g., read user goals

api:authorizationScopes.name: write
api:authorizationScopes.description: Allows writing data to Product Hunt on behalf of the authenticated user, e.g., manage goals. Requires special approval.
